mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive returns occur in fewer than 55% of rate-cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate equity sell-offs over the following week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in over 60% of instances where the unemployment threshold is breached.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in retail sales and housing starts fail to produce a statistically significant positive alpha (p > 0.05) over 60-day horizons.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 1.5% quarter-over-quarter during late-cycle expansions confirms capacity utilization limits, prompting forward-looking equity appreciation over one month.
failure_condition: The signal generates negative forward returns in late-cycle regimes or shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) when industrial production accelerates.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth rates directly increase corporate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: GDP growth levels show zero correlation with 5-day forward returns or produce negative returns in over 50% of high-growth observations.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index level surpassing 230 triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, causing negative equity returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally with positive 60-day returns in more than 65% of periods where the CPI threshold is breached.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total employment combined with falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market tightening, supporting positive equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint labor signal fails to predict positive returns or yields a negative Rank IC over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales contractions during post-shock recovery phases indicate fragile consumer demand, leading to immediate negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Retail sales declines in recovery regimes produce positive 5-day forward returns in over 55% of cases or show no statistical significance.
